## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

List the commands you ran and their results.

## Checklist

- [ ] I built with warnings treated as errors.
- [ ] I ran the relevant CTest tests.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] I updated documentation and the changelog where required.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, profiles, customer apps, signed IPAs, build outputs, or debug artifacts.
- [ ] I documented any compatibility impact to signing output, report schemas, issue codes, or bundle traversal order.
